summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 16→Jul 22 vs Jul 9→Jul 15* · Revenue +46% (1,503,190 vs 1,030,405 EGP) · Spend +28% · ROAS 6.5 (+13%).
   • CPC: 2.2 → 1.88 EGP (-15%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.04% → 0.82% (-21%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,215 → 1,485 EGP (+22%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 40%* of the move (hurt, -401,580 EGP)  ·  *AOV 34%* of the move (helped, +273,240 EGP)  ·  *CPC 26%* of the move (helped, +39,334 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +22%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *273,240 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +13%.
     Revenue +46% because spend +28%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *Catalogue b2s school 26*, its AOV went None EGP→1614.45 EGP on 8,340 EGP spend (~24% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 16→Jul 22 vs Jul 9→Jul 15* · Revenue +10% (210,239 vs 190,730 EGP) · Spend +39% · ROAS 3.37 (-21%).
   • CPC: 9.94 → 8.18 EGP (-18%, down (good))
   • CVR: 2.53% → 1.68% (-34%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,673 → 1,642 EGP (-2%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 66%* of the move (hurt, -106,283 EGP)  ·  *CPC 31%* of the move (helped, +13,402 EGP)  ·  *AOV 3%* of the move (hurt, -3,968 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -34%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-106,283 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -21%.
     Revenue +10% because spend +39%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255463433720011|Scaling Robes boys capcut new arrivals - Copy>, its CVR went 5.88%→2.81% on 6,963 EGP spend (~41% of the swing).
